title: SpaceAPI Directory Entry
description: Schema for a SpaceAPI directory entry representing a registered hackerspace or makerspace

items.description: List of all registered spaces in the SpaceAPI directory

SpaceEntry.title: Space Entry
SpaceEntry.description: A single space registered in the SpaceAPI directory

url.description: URL to the space's SpaceAPI JSON endpoint

valid.description: Indicates whether the space endpoint provides a valid SpaceAPI JSON file

space.description: The name of the hackerspace or makerspace

lastSeen.description: Unix timestamp of the last time the endpoint was reachable and returned valid JSON

errMsg.description: Error message if an issue was found with the specific endpoint

data.description: Raw JSON payload from the last successful scraping of the space's SpaceAPI endpoint
